home.description: A network connecting Uzbek engineers studying and working across the world. Share know-how, find collaborators for your projects, and get guidance.

directory.title: Engineer directory
directory.desc: See who works in which field, where, and on what.

qa.title: Questions & answers
qa.desc: Get answers to technical and career questions from the community.

projects.title: Project board
projects.desc: Find the right engineer for your project.

mentorship.title: Mentorship
mentorship.desc: Get guidance from engineers who studied or worked abroad.
